mini-gradebook-capstone.label: Pwojè Final: Konstwi yon Ti Liv Nòt
mini-gradebook-capstone.summary: Fini kou a ak yon capstone liv nòt ki pi long ki grandi etap pa etap soti nan liy rapò debaz yo rive nan yon rezime final konplè.

cp_3.title: Swiv nòt ki pi wo a

cp_6.title: Konstwi rapò final liv nòt la

capstone-mini-gradebook.title: Konstwi rapò final liv nòt la
capstone-mini-gradebook.prompt:
Kòmanse apati apèsi liv nòt k ap mache a ou fèk konstwi a. Kenbe bouk la, swivi nòt ki pi wo a, kalkil mwayèn nan, ak lojik estati a, men ranplase vèsyon stil apèsi a ak rapò final egzak la.

Fòma antre:
1. Non elèv la
2. Kantite nòt yo
3. Kantite valè nòt sa yo, youn pa liy

Rezilta final obligatwa:
Student: <name>
Scores entered: <count>
Highest score: <highest>
Average: <average>
Status: <status>
capstone-mini-gradebook.hint: Dènye etap la se yon etap netwayaj: kenbe kalkil yo, retire liy Total apèsi a, epi enprime sèlman lòd rapò final la.

help.concept: Yon bon capstone fini lè li poli yon pwogram ki deja mache olye pou li rekòmanse depi nan kòmansman. Kenbe menm lojik la epi bay rezilta a fòm final livrezon an.
help.hint_1: Li nòt yo ak `for i in range(count)`, mete ajou `total` ak `highest`, epi apre sa kalkile `average = total / count`.
help.hint_2: Enprime liy final yo nan lòd egzak yo montre a, epi chwazi estati a ak `if` / `elif` / `else`.

capstone-mini-gradebook.starterCode:
student = input()
count = int(input())

print(f"Student: {student}")
print(f"Scores entered: {count}")

total = 0
highest = 0
for i in range(count):
    score = int(input())
    total = total + score
    if score > highest:
        highest = score

average = total / count

print(f"Total: {total}")
print(f"Highest score: {highest}")
print(f"Average: {average:.1f}")

if average >= 90:
    print("Status: excellent")
elif average >= 70:
    print("Status: passing")
else:
    print("Status: needs practice")

# Replace the preview-style version with the final report.
# Remove the Total line and keep only the required final output order.

try-mini-gradebook-capstone-sketch0.title: Enprime premye liy liv nòt la
try-mini-gradebook-capstone-sketch0.prompt: Kòmanse capstone a ak yon ti apèsi rapò. Li non yon elèv epi enprime `Student: <name>`.
try-mini-gradebook-capstone-sketch0.hint: Sèvi ak `input()` pou non an, epi apre sa enprime liy ki gen etikèt la ak yon f-string.

help.concept: Capstone a grandi yon liy rapò alafwa, kidonk premye apèsi a bezwen sèlman etikèt elèv la.
help.hint_1: Sere non ki soti nan `input()` la nan `student`.

try-mini-gradebook-capstone-sketch0.starterCode:
student = input()

# Print the first report line as Student: <name>

cp-1-read-gradebook-header.title: Li antèt liv nòt la
cp-1-read-gradebook-header.prompt: Yon pwofesè patikilye vle rapò liv nòt la kòmanse ak non elèv la ak kantite nòt yo. Li `student` ak `count`, epi apre sa enprime de premye liy rapò yo.
cp-1-read-gradebook-header.hint: Etap sa a sèlman konstwi antèt rapò a: li de antre yo epi make yo klèman.

help.concept: Yon rapò souvan kòmanse ak enfòmasyon idantifikasyon anvan nenpòt kalkil fèt.

cp-1-read-gradebook-header.starterCode:
student = input()
count = int(input())

# Start the gradebook report.
# Print the student line and the scores-entered line.

cp-2-add-score-total.title: Ajoute total nòt yo
cp-2-add-score-total.prompt: Kenbe liy antèt yo k ap mache yo. Kounye a li egzakteman `count` nòt ak yon bouk `for`, ajoute yo nan `total`, epi enprime yon liy apèsi ki montre total la.
cp-2-add-score-total.hint: Kite bouk la fè travay antre repete a, epi mete ajou `total` chak fwa li pase.

help.concept: Yon akimilatè kòmanse nan 0 epi li grandi yon ti kras chak fwa bouk la li yon nouvo valè.
help.hint_2: Anndan bouk la, sèvi ak `total = total + score`, epi apre sa enprime `Total: ...` apre bouk la.

cp-2-add-score-total.starterCode:
student = input()
count = int(input())

print(f"Student: {student}")
print(f"Scores entered: {count}")

total = 0
for i in range(count):
    score = int(input())
    # Add each score to total.

# Print a preview line: Total: <total>

cp-3-track-highest-score.title: Swiv nòt ki pi wo a
cp-3-track-highest-score.prompt: Kenbe antèt la ak lojik total la k ap mache. Kounye a ajoute `highest` pou pwogram nan sonje pi gwo nòt li wè jiskaprezan, epi enprime nouvo liy apèsi sa a tou.
cp-3-track-highest-score.hint: Ranplase `highest` sèlman lè nòt aktyèl la pi gwo pase ansyen an.

help.concept: Yon maksimòm k ap kontinye kenbe pi bon valè yo jwenn jiskaprezan pandan bouk la ap pase nan antre yo.
help.hint_2: Anndan bouk la, sèvi ak `if score > highest:` anvan ou mete `highest` ajou.

cp-3-track-highest-score.starterCode:
student = input()
count = int(input())

print(f"Student: {student}")
print(f"Scores entered: {count}")

total = 0
highest = 0
for i in range(count):
    score = int(input())
    total = total + score
    # Keep total working, then update highest when this score is bigger.

print(f"Total: {total}")
# Print Highest score: <highest>

cp-4-calculate-average.title: Kalkile mwayèn nan
cp-4-calculate-average.prompt: Kenbe total k ap kontinye a ak nòt ki pi wo a. Apre bouk la, kalkile mwayèn nan epi ajoute liy mwayèn fòmate a nan rapò apèsi a.
cp-4-calculate-average.hint: Fè divizyon an apre bouk la, epi apre sa enprime rezilta a ak yon chif apre pwen desimal la.

help.concept: Bouk la ranmase enfòmasyon yo an premye, epi mwayèn nan kalkile yon fwa total la ak kantite a toude pare.
help.hint_1: Sèvi ak `average = total / count` apre bouk la fini.

cp-4-calculate-average.starterCode:
student = input()
count = int(input())

print(f"Student: {student}")
print(f"Scores entered: {count}")

total = 0
highest = 0
for i in range(count):
    score = int(input())
    total = total + score
    if score > highest:
        highest = score

print(f"Total: {total}")
print(f"Highest score: {highest}")

# Calculate average after the loop.
# Print Average: <average> with one digit after the decimal point.

cp-5-choose-status.title: Chwazi liy estati a
cp-5-choose-status.prompt: Kenbe rapò apèsi k ap mache a, epi apre sa ajoute liy estati final la: `excellent` pou mwayèn omwen 90, `passing` pou mwayèn omwen 70, epi `needs practice` sinon.
cp-5-choose-status.hint: Sèvi ak yon chèn `if` / `elif` / `else` apre mwayèn nan pare.

help.concept: Yon fwa yon pwogram gen rezime final nòt la, kondisyon yo ka tounen li an yon jijman senp moun ka konprann fasil.
help.hint_2: Sèvi ak `elif average >= 70` pou ka mitan an, epi `else` pou ka ki rete a.

cp-5-choose-status.starterCode:
student = input()
count = int(input())

print(f"Student: {student}")
print(f"Scores entered: {count}")

total = 0
highest = 0
for i in range(count):
    score = int(input())
    total = total + score
    if score > highest:
        highest = score

average = total / count

print(f"Total: {total}")
print(f"Highest score: {highest}")
print(f"Average: {average:.1f}")

# Add the status line.
# Print excellent for averages 90+, passing for 70+, and needs practice otherwise.

try_mini_gradebook_capstone_sketch0.title: Eseye li ou menm
try_mini_gradebook_capstone_sketch0.prompt: Li non yon elèv epi enprime premye liy rapò a kòm `Student: <name>`.

sketch_gradebook_plan.title: Planifye liv nòt la
sketch_gradebook_plan.bodyMarkdown:
Imajine yon pwofesè patikilye k ap prepare pou rankont ak paran yo. Li poko bezwen yon gwo sistèm lekòl. Li bezwen yon pwogram Python serye ki ka li non yon elèv, ranmase nòt yo, epi tounen yo an yon rapò li ka li byen vit.

Capstone sa a kounye a grandi nan yon sekans klè: dabò antèt la, apre sa total la, apre sa nòt ki pi wo a, apre sa mwayèn nan, apre sa estati a, epi finalman rapò final poli a. Chak etap kòmanse soti nan vèsyon anvan an ki deja mache pou tout pwojè a santi tankou yon sèl ti zouti reyèl olye de yon sèl gwo sote.
